name: luly-v0-4-0
description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.4.0 (minor ‚Äî template courses): an academy can now carry multiple courses, where extra ones are content-less 'template' stubs (a real catalog card ‚Äî title + description ‚Äî backed by a default 3-lesson scaffold the user fills later in the CMS). Strictly OPT-IN: default behavior is one authored course; stubs are added only when the user asks for several/placeholder courses or clearly lists course topics. /luly-plan emits an optional `## Template courses` list (Title | description); omitting the `## Section N` blocks yields an onboarding-only academy with just stubs. The assembler builds each stub from a bundled, sanitized copy of the app's default-course template (Onboarding + Completion lessons removed; screen backgrounds + control color overrides stripped so the PRODUCT THEME applies to every screen ‚Äî no custom backgrounds), gives every node a fresh slug (controls use relative targets, no reference rewrite), and uses the flow's shared branded placeholder for card + icon. v0.3.3 (patch ‚Äî logos & image sizes): (1) Real-logo bug fix ‚Äî the assembler's loadInlineSvg required SVG markup to start with `<svg`, so real downloaded brand logos that lead with an `<?xml?>` prolog / `<!DOCTYPE>` / comments (Wikipedia, CDNs) were silently dropped ‚Äî no header logo, no hub logo. It now slices from the first `<svg`, so real logos inline correctly. (2) Logo priority ‚Äî header prefers the icon-only mark (short), hub prefers the lockup-with-name (long); PNG/JPEG URLs accepted as fallback. (3) Logos are real-or-asked, never fabricated ‚Äî when no real logo/icon is found after the full research ladder, the pipeline asks the user (abstract stand-in vs neutral placeholder) instead of drawing a fake; dead `hub-logo.svg` generation removed. (4) Card covers are abstract ‚Äî no text, no wordmark, no literal product; calm brand-color shapes. (5) Image sizes aligned to the app: media placeholder is SQUARE 800√ó800 (app media block defaults to 1:1), card cover is a wide ~10:3 banner (1600√ó480) matching the app default card.png (503√ó151, cover-cropped fixed-height), icon stays 1:1. v0.3.2 (patch): fix a v0.3.1 regression ‚Äî the post-assembly validator still REQUIRED `body.theme.layout`, but v0.3.1 made the assembler omit `layout` when a flow has no overrides (the common case), so every default flow failed validation with "body.theme.layout missing" and had to be hand-patched. The validator now treats `layout` as optional (validates its shape only when present), matching the assembler and the app renderer (which falls back to the 1480px desktop default when layout is absent). v0.3.1 (minor ‚Äî schema accuracy, mobile/desktop, color application): (1) Layout-token fix ‚Äî flow-level layout overrides use the renderer's suffixed keys `maxWidthDesktop` / `paddingDesktop` (+ `*Mobile`); the old bare `maxWidth` default was silently ignored and is dropped, so flows keep the app default desktop width (1480px) unless deliberately overridden. (2) Color application ‚Äî luly-style now documents where key tokens actually render (quiz answer cards: `onSurface` unselected, `primaryLight` selected, `successLight` correct, `failureLight` wrong; `secondary` dark callouts with `textOnPrimary` text) and adds mandatory contrast targets for those answer-card and dark-callout pairs. (3) Per-viewport awareness ‚Äî skills now reference the `*Mobile` style tokens and per-block margin model (`margin*` / `margin*Mobile`, defaults top 16 / bottom 0) as polishing levers for the future agentic-edit scope, explicitly NOT emitted during simple generation.
